Known in NBA circles as being the “money whisperer”, Joe discusses how he pivoted from a playing career to managing money for high profile celebrities and professional athletes.

summary: As British stalwart Tate & Lyle relocates to the US, which startups might one day take its place?

title: NYNJ FIFA Chief on How Fans Can Get to MetLife Stadium for the Games
title_cn: 纽约州国际足联主席介绍球迷如何前往大都会人寿体育场观看比赛
summary: Alex Lasry, Chief Executive Officer of the NYNJ Host Committee for the FIFA World Cup 2026, says the region is ready for the tournament and contingency plans are in place for any transportation issues that arise.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
title_cn: 在我们的 IQ 测试中测试您的 ETF 知识
summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Shops 15% Yield Debt for Trump-Boosted Oil Driller
title_cn: 摩根大通为特朗普推动的石油钻探公司购买 15% 的收益率债务
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is in talks with investors to refinance a nearly $1 billion loan at a 15% interest rate for Sable Offshore Corp., a Trump administration-supported oil driller, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Bitcoin’s $235 Billion Crash Masks Bigger Shift in Crypto
title_cn: 比特币 2350 亿美元的暴跌掩盖了加密货币领域的更大转变
summary: The easiest way to understand crypto used to be to look at Bitcoin.

title: Ingredion CEO Says Tate & Lyle Deal Creates Powerhouse
title_cn: Ingredion 首席执行官表示 Tate & Lyle 交易将打造强大动力
summary: Ingredion Inc. agreed to buy Tate & Lyle Plc for £2.7 billion ($3.6 billion), and will end the UK company’s near-century listing on the London Stock Exchange. Ingredion Chief Executive Officer James Zallie says the US company paid a "fair" premium and this deal creates an ingredients "powerhouse." He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Forces Investors to Bet on Musk’s Entangled AI Empire
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股迫使投资者押注马斯克错综复杂的人工智能帝国
summary: The boundaries between Elon Musk’s companies are growing increasingly blurred through shared capital, talent and infrastructure. Investors must decide what that ecosystem is worth.

title: Amazon Raises C$14 Billion in Record Canadian Dollar Bond Sale
title_cn: 亚马逊发行创纪录的加元债券筹集 140 亿加元
summary: Amazon.com Inc. sold C$14 billion ($10 billion) of Canadian dollar high-grade bonds, the largest corporate debt offering on record in the currency, after drawing about twice that amount in demand.

title: New York’s Penn Station Rehab Eyes Billions in Federal Funding
title_cn: 纽约宾夕法尼亚车站康复中心寻求数十亿联邦资金
summary: The entities transforming New York’s Penn Station are slated to learn how much federal money will be directed to the project in about six months, according to Peter Cipriano, chief executive officer of the Halmar-Skanska consortium, the renovation’s master developer.

title: US Stocks Rebound From Selloff as Chipmakers, Energy Shares Rise
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商和能源股上涨，美国股市从抛售中反弹
summary: US stocks advanced on Monday, paring last week’s slump, as chipmakers surged and traders assessed cooling tensions in the Middle East, which supported oil prices and energy shares.

title: Vale CEO Says Metals Demand Is Robust Despite Conflict With Iran
title_cn: 淡水河谷首席执行官表示，尽管与伊朗发生冲突，金属需求依然强劲
summary:
Gustavo Pimenta, CEO of Vale, says that conflict with Iran has not impacted global demand for metals from the top iron ore producer. Pimenta also discussed the impact of the war on its sites in Oman, saying that he remains optimistic about the facility's future despite having to shut down production during the conflict. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Growing CRE Opportunities Outside of Data Centers: Chen
title_cn: 数据中心之外不断增长的商业地产机会：Chen
summary: Morris Chen, portfolio manager CBMS/CRE debt at DoubleLine, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the evolution in the financing market, the bifurcated recovery of the commercial real estate market, and the risks investing in data centers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Growing Population of Zombie ETF
title_cn: 僵尸ETF数量不断增长
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Athanasios Psarofagis joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the growing population of zombie ETFs, which are defined as funds that are at least three years old and manage less than $50 million.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Incredible Interest in Space This Year: Chanin
title_cn: 今年对太空的兴趣令人难以置信：查宁
summary: Andrew Chanin, co-founder and CEO of ProcureAM, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the SpaceX IP0 and how it has inspired investor interest in the Space ecosystem. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ratcliffe’s Ineos Launches Loan Deal After War Boost
title_cn: 拉特克利夫的英力士在战后推出贷款协议
summary: Ineos Group started marketing new term loans to raise around $960 million, marking the second time in recent weeks that Jim Ratcliffe’s struggling chemicals conglomerate has tapped debt markets.

title: Costs in ETF Industry Being Driven Up By Fees: Tolle
title_cn: ETF行业的成本因费用而上涨：Tolle
summary: Perth Tolle, founder of Life + Liberty Indexes, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the rising costs in the ETF industry for investors as Fidelity's fees come into focus. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks Rally in AI Trade Revival After Plunge: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 暴跌后芯片股在人工智能贸易复苏中反弹：市场总结
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid renewed enthusiasm over artificial intelligence and bets that a solid economy will keep powering Corporate America.

title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh US-Iran Attempts to End Attacks
title_cn: 交易员权衡美国和伊朗结束袭击的努力，金价稳定
summary: Gold steadied after Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations. Copper advanced.

title: First Brands Wins Second Chance to Pursue Liquidation Proposal
title_cn: First Brands 赢得第二次执行清算提案的机会
summary: Bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands can try, for the second time, to win court approval for a creditor vote of a proposal to raise money through lawsuits against the company’s former top officers and lenders, a judge said Monday.

title: BofA Warns It’s Time to ‘Take Profits’ as Red Flags Multiply
title_cn: 美银警告危险信号增多，是时候“获利了结”了
summary: Investors should exercise caution regarding US stocks as an increasing number of “bear market signposts” point to an approaching top, according to Bank of America Securities.

title: Treasuries Pare Drop in Oil-Driven Move Tied to Iran War
title_cn: 与伊朗战争相关的石油驱动举措导致美国国债跌幅收窄
summary: Treasuries pared declines, pulling two-year yields back from a more than 15-month high, as reports of a ceasefire between Israel and Iran eased the upward pressure on oil prices.

title: Pulte is 'Woefully Under Qualified' To Be Intelligence Director Says Riggleman
title_cn: 里格曼表示，普尔特“严重不符合”担任情报总监的资格
summary: Denver Riggleman, Former-Republican Congressman from Virginia and CEO of RIIG Technology joins to discuss the latest from Congress and gave his thoughts on the promotion of Bill Pulte. At least seven Senate Democrats would have to vote in favor in order to re-authorize Section 702, but they have threatened to block any extension if the White House doesn’t withdraw Pulte’s appointment.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inflated ‘Private’ Ratings Are Masking Credit Risk, Columbia Study Says
title_cn: 哥伦比亚研究称，夸大的“私人”评级掩盖了信用风险
summary: Ratings that underpin a growing slice of the $1.8 trillion private-credit market, the hottest corner of Wall Street in recent years, are systematically understating investment risk, according to a new study by Columbia Business School researchers.

title: US Removes Amazon Satellite Launch Deadline Amid Rocket Shortage
title_cn: 由于火箭短缺，美国取消了亚马逊卫星发射最后期限
summary: Amazon.com Inc. was relieved of a government deadline to have half of its planned satellite constellation up and running by next month, delaying the risk that regulators might suddenly curb the broadband internet operation.

title: Jefferies Returns From Caracas Saying Dollar Flows May Lift Debt
title_cn: 杰富瑞从加拉加斯返回称美元流动可能会解除债务
summary: Venezuela’s economy is poised for an influx of foreign investment that could support higher bond prices, according to a Wall Street analyst who visited the country last week.

title: Vale CEO Says Metals Demand Is Robust Despite Iran Conflict
title_cn: 淡水河谷首席执行官表示，尽管伊朗冲突，金属需求依然强劲
summary: Vale SA, the world’s top iron ore producer, sees no evidence of war-related demand destruction in global metals markets and has experienced swelling margins as the Iran conflict disrupts raw-material flows, said Chief Executive Officer Gustavo Pimenta.

title: Oil Edges Higher After Iran, Israel Signal Halt to Escalations
title_cn: 伊朗、以色列发出停止升级信号后油价小幅走高
summary: Oil edged higher after Israel and Iran signaled they would refrain from further escalation after a day of hostilities between the two sides.

title: Investors Fled From Bearish Oil Fund at a Record Pace Last Week
title_cn: 上周投资者以创纪录的速度逃离看空石油基金
summary: An exchange-traded product that profits when oil prices fall had its biggest weekly outflow on record as several buffers that had helped keep rallies in check begin to fade.

title: Lots of Heartburn Over The Anti-Weaponization Fund Says Rep. Comer
title_cn: 众议员科默表示，反武器化基金令人心痛
summary: Congressman James Comer, Chairman of the House Oversight Committee and Republican representing Kentucky's 1st District joined Balance of Power to discuss the latest on Reconciliation, the DOJ Fund and the likelihood of FISA lapsing at the end of the week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Files Confidentially for IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 秘密提交 IPO 文件
summary: OpenAI filed confidentially for an IPO with the SEC, working with Goldman Sachs Group and Morgan Stanley on a potential listing. Romaine Bostick reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Investors Give Lukewarm Reaction to New Siri, AI Platform
title_cn: 苹果投资者对新的 Siri 和人工智能平台反应冷淡
summary: Apple Inc. used its Worldwide Developers Conference to lay the foundation for a new generation of products, making the case that it can overcome years of snags to compete in the AI era.

title: Cipher Sells Junk Debt for Amazon-Tied Data Center Project
title_cn: Cipher 为亚马逊数据中心项目出售垃圾债务
summary: Cipher Digital Inc. raised $810 million from a junk-bond sale to help fund a data center tied to Amazon.com Inc., adding to a wave of riskier debt financing backing the artificial intelligence infrastructure boom.

title: Tech Earnings Are on Fire, Golub Says
title_cn: 戈卢布表示，科技股的盈利正在火爆
summary: Jonathan Golub of Seaport Global Holdings says "earnings are absolutely on fire," and valuations are lower almost everywhere. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key Takeaways From Apple's WWDC 2026 Event
title_cn: Apple WWDC 2026 活动的要点
summary: Apple unveiled its new intelligence system — underpinned by Google technology —  during a keynote presentation at the company’s Worldwide Developers Conference. Ed Ludlow breaks down what you need to know. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Delays Siri AI for iPhone Users in the EU, Says Regulators Refusing to Engage
title_cn: 监管机构拒绝参与 苹果推迟向欧盟 iPhone 用户提供 Siri AI
summary: Apple Inc. said it isn’t currently able to launch Siri AI, its redesigned digital assistant, on iPhones or iPads in the European Union, marking the company’s latest standoff with the continent’s antitrust watchdog.

title: Apple Downplays Concerns That Its Use of Google AI Models Will Undermine Privacy
title_cn: 苹果淡化了对其使用谷歌人工智能模型会损害隐私的担忧
summary: Apple Inc., which just unveiled a revamped artificial intelligence platform built in part with Google technology, said the new approach will still preserve the company’s privacy safeguards.

title: NZ Commits to First LNG Import Plant Despite Gas Price Surge
title_cn: 尽管天然气价格飙升，新西兰仍致力于建设第一座液化天然气进口工厂
summary: The New Zealand government will take the next step to build the country’s first liquefied natural gas import facility, sticking with its plan to bolster energy security despite the surge in global gas prices due to the Iran war.

title: Siri Co-Founder Calls Apple's Update a 'Great First Step'
title_cn: Siri 联合创始人称苹果的更新是“伟大的第一步”
summary: Dag Kittlaus, co-founder of Siri, reacts to Apple's AI ambitions. The new Apple Intelligence system was unveiled during a keynote presentation at the company’s Worldwide Developers Conference. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Discussion on the Iconoclast Dinner Experience and Its Cultural Impact
title_cn: 讨论反传统晚餐体验及其文化影响
summary: Esi Eggleston Bracey, former Unilever Global Chief Growth & Marketing Officer, shared her involvement with the Iconoclast dinner experience, highlighting its significance as a coveted event in the culinary world. She described how the event, founded by Dr. Lezli Levene-Harvell, has been developed over eleven years to identify and bring together top influencers and power players in culinary cuisine. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brookfield's Rashid Not Surprised by Tech Selloff
title_cn: 布鲁克菲尔德的拉希德对科技股抛售并不感到惊讶
summary: Brookfield Head of AI Infrastructure and Head of Europe Sikander Rashid joins Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off London Tech Week as part of Bloomberg Brief.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ETF IQ 6/8/2026
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Procuream Co-Founder & CEO Andrew Chanin, Life + Liberty Indexes Founder Perth Tolle, and DoubleLine Portfolio Manager Morris Chen. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'No Momentum in Labor Market' Says LinkedIn's Kory Kantenga
title_cn: LinkedIn 的 Kory Kantenga 表示，“劳动力市场没有动力”
summary: Kory Kantenga, head of economics, Americas at LinkedIn, said that the labor market has 'no momentum,' but maintains that it is too early to tell if it is the impact of artificial intelligence.  Kantenga said that recent college grads are feeling the impact as companies reduce entry level opportunities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Investors Tepid About New AI Platform
title_cn: 苹果投资者对新人工智能平台态度不温不火
summary: Apple investors gave a tepid reception to the next generation of its AI platform. The new Apple Intelligence system, underpinned by Google technology, was unveiled during a keynote presentation at the company’s Worldwide Developers Conference. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Unveils Next Generation of AI Platform, Including New Siri
title_cn: 苹果推出下一代人工智能平台，包括新 Siri
summary: Apple Inc. unveiled the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform, including an update to its Siri digital assistant, part of a bid to catch up with Silicon Valley peers in a critical market.  Apple Inc. investors gave a tepid reception to the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform, which is key to the company’s bid to catch up with Silicon Valley peers in a critical market. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports on Apple’s unveiling of the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTX Co-Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Applies for Trump Pardon
title_cn: FTX 联合创始人 Sam Bankman-Fried 申请特朗普赦免
summary: FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried formally applied for a presidential pardon, more than two years after he was convicted over the multi-billion dollar collapse of his once-thriving cryptocurrency empire.

title: Here Are the Key Takeaways From Apple WWDC
title_cn: 以下是 Apple WWDC 的主要要点
summary: Here are the biggest takeaways from Apple Inc.’s annual developers conference keynote:

title: German Police Investigate Arson Attack at Power Substation
title_cn: 德国警方调查变电站纵火案
summary: German police and state prosecutors are investigating a suspected arson attack on a substation in southern Germany that affected a hospital and tens of thousands of homes and businesses on Monday.

title: What Apple's 2025 iPhone App of the Year Founders Want From Siri
title_cn: Apple 2025 年度 iPhone 应用创始人希望 Siri 提供什么
summary: As Apple kicks off WWDC in Cupertino, the spotlight is turning to inclusive design. Melissa Azari and Helene Nørlem are the co-founders of Denmark-based Tiimo, a visual planning app that was crowned Apple's iPhone App of the Year. They join Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" from Cupertino, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Early Stage Investing in the Age of Huge Pre-IPO Rounds
title_cn: 巨额 Pre-IPO 轮次时代的早期投资
summary: Kindred Ventures has raised $355 million for its latest deep tech and robotics funds, fresh capital which comes as the firm's previous vintage hits the top 1% of its class. Kindred Ventures Managing Partner and founder Steve Jang, joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Unveils New AI Platform and Siri Upgrades
title_cn: 苹果推出新的人工智能平台和 Siri 升级
summary: Apple Inc. unveiled the next generation of its artificial intelligence platform, including an update to its Siri digital assistant, part of a bid to catch up with Silicon Valley peers in a critical market. Ed Ludlow reports from Cupertino, California where the company's Worldwide Developers Conference is underway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Developers Hope for Big Leaps From Apple's AI
title_cn: 开发者希望苹果人工智能能够实现巨大飞跃
summary: Paul Hudson is a software developer and the creator of Hacking with Swift, a platform that trains people to develop on the Apple ecosystem. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" from in Cupertino to discuss why he is hoping for some "great APIs" from Apple. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Expectations From Apple’s Big AI, Siri Launch
title_cn: 对苹果大人工智能 Siri 的期待
summary: Carolina Milanesi, Creative Strategies president and principal analyst, joins Ed Ludlow in Cupertino, California to discuss what happens next after Apple rolls out an overhauled version of the Siri digital assistant, and the importance of having the AI embedded into the consumer's devices. She joins on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Big AI, Siri and Software Launch | Bloomberg Tech 6/8/2026
title_cn: 苹果的大人工智能、Siri 和软件发布 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 8 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss what to expect out of Apple's developer conference in Cupertino as the iPhone maker is set to unveil a revamped Siri. Plus, Nvidia and SK Hynix partner up on next-generation AI memory chips with a multi-year deal, and SpaceX gets ready to go public this week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside a Brain-Chip Startup in China
title_cn: 中国脑芯片初创公司内部
summary: Brain-computer interfaces could dramatically alter how humans interact with technology. Startups around the world, including in China, are racing to get their devices approved for commercial use.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Drahi Reaches €20 Billion Deal to Sell Phone Carrier SFR
title_cn: Drahi 达成 200 亿欧元出售电话运营商 SFR 的协议
summary: Billionaire Patrick Drahi has reached an agreement to sell French mobile carrier SFR to a consortium of rival telecommunications firms, in a deal that values the company €20.4 billion ($23.5 billion) and will test regulators’ tolerance for consolidation.

title: Bolivia President Signs Law to Toughen Crackdown on Protests
title_cn: 玻利维亚总统签署法律加强对抗议活动的镇压
summary: Bolivia’s embattled President Rodrigo Paz signed a measure that clears the way for a more aggressive crackdown on anti-government protests that have rocked the South American country for more than five weeks.

title: Apple Announces AI Revamp as Chip Stocks Soar| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/8/2026
title_cn: 随着芯片股飙升，苹果宣布人工智能改造|彭博商业周刊日报 6/8/2026
summary: Today, Ed Ludlow from Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, as the tech giant announces a reworked AI slate, including a revamped Siri. Then, LinkedIn head of economics, Americas Kory Kantenga,  discusses the labor market as businesses and new grads feels the impact of AI. Plus, author and podcast host Ruthie Rogers talks food culture and her new book 'Table 4 at the River Cafe.' Also, Lisa Abramowicz talks with Vale CEO Gustavo Pimenta live in Rio de Janeiro (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Latest Midterms Problem Is an Emboldened Iran
title_cn: 特朗普最新的中期选举问题是伊朗的胆大妄为
summary: The US president fails to replicate his Venezuela success in the Middle East.

title: Brazil Court Suspends AtlasIntel Poll Challenged by Bolsonaro
title_cn: 巴西法院暂停博尔索纳罗质疑的 AtlasIntel 民意调查
summary: Brazil’s electoral court suspended the circulation of an AtlasIntel poll that showed Senator Flávio Bolsonaro losing ground in the presidential race, citing alleged problems with the pollster’s methodology.

title: Pentagon Accuses Alibaba, Baidu of Aiding China’s Military
title_cn: 五角大楼指责阿里巴巴、百度援助中国军方
summary: The Pentagon accused some of China’s biggest companies including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc. and BYD Co. of supporting the Chinese military, doubling down on an earlier decision to label crown jewels of the country’s corporate world as threats to US national security.

title: Trump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa Application Fee Rejected by Judge
title_cn: 特朗普 10 万美元的 H-1B 签证申请费被法官拒绝
summary: A federal judge struck down a $100,000 fee President Donald Trump ordered for H-1B visa applications, providing a reprieve for US technology companies that rely on hiring skilled foreign workers. Michael Shepard explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Picks Blanche as Attorney General, Senate Fight Looms
title_cn: 特朗普选择布兰奇担任司法部长，参议院之争迫在眉睫
summary: President Donald Trump nominated Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche to fill the position on a permanent basis, rewarding a loyal ally whose controversial actions ensure an uphill Senate confirmation fight.

title: Vale CEO Sees No Demand Destruction in Metals Markets
title_cn: 淡水河谷首席执行官认为金属市场需求不会受到破坏
summary: Vale SA Chief Executive Officer Gustavo Pimenta says he sees no evidence of demand destruction in global metal markets despite war in the Middle East. In fact, he sees growth in demand around the world. He speaks to Bloomberg's Lisa Abramowicz.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks | Balance of Power 6/8/2026
title_cn: 伊朗和以色列承诺停止袭击权力平衡 6/8/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, American Enterprise Institute Nonresident Senior Fellow Heather Conley, Republican Congressman James Comer, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and former Republican Congressman Denver Riggleman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru Vote Is Too Close To Call As Fujimori's Lead Narrows
title_cn: 秘鲁投票结果势均力敌，藤森领先优势缩小
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as conservative Keiko Fujimori’s razor-thin lead over leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez narrowed with votes still being counted. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Urges Thune to Fire US Senate Rules Referee ‘Immediately’
title_cn: 特朗普敦促图恩“立即”解雇美国参议院规则裁判
summary: Donald Trump called on Senate Majority Leader John Thune to fire the Senate’s top rules keeper after one of her decisions thwarted the president’s efforts to attach voter identification legislation to a budget package.

title: Germany and France Pull Plug on Next-Generation Jet Project
title_cn: 德国和法国终止下一代喷气机项目
summary: The German government said it agreed with France to halt a €100 billion ($115 billion) joint fighter-jet project after failing to overcome persistent cross-border disagreements and multiple delays since its initiation almost a decade ago.

title: Trump to Attend NY Knicks Game Monday at Madison Square Garden
title_cn: 特朗普将于周一在麦迪逊广场花园观看纽约尼克斯队的比赛
summary: President Donald Trump is planning to attend Game 3 of the NBA Finals as his hometown team, the New York Knicks, host the San Antonio Spurs — one of the city’s hottest sports tickets in years.

title: Kenya High Court Upholds Impeachment of Ruto’s Former Deputy
title_cn: 肯尼亚高等法院维持对鲁托前副手的弹劾
summary: A Kenyan high court upheld the impeachment of President William Ruto’s former deputy almost two years ago, even though it found the process hadn’t been held in a fair manner.

title: Trump Border Chief Warns New York ICE Surge Is ‘Coming’
title_cn: 特朗普边境局长警告纽约 ICE 激增“即将到来”
summary: The Trump administration has drawn up a plan to surge US Immigration and Customs Enforcement personnel to New York City, a move that threatens to escalate tensions with New York Governor Kathy Hochul over the president’s migrant crackdown.

title: Peru Vote Is Too Close to Call as Leftist Sánchez Nudges Ahead
title_cn: 秘鲁投票结果势均力敌，左翼桑切斯领先
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez nudged ahead of conservative Keiko Fujimori with votes still being counted.

title: UN Says Children Are Dying in Cuba Because of Strict US Sanctions
title_cn: 联合国表示，由于美国的严格制裁，古巴儿童正在死亡
summary: Tighter US sanctions on Cuba have led to a spike in infant mortality and plummeting survival rates for child cancer patients, the United Nations warned in one of its strongest rebukes of Washington’s pressure campaign against the island.

title: Swiss Lawmakers Tackle Foie Gras Appetite After Activist Push
title_cn: 瑞士立法者在活动人士推动下解决鹅肝食欲问题
summary: Swiss lawmakers want to reduce foie gras imports and keep the option of prohibiting them on the table if tougher labeling rules don’t curb demand for the controversial delicacy within five years.

title: How Israel’s Battle With Hezbollah Fits Into the Iran War
title_cn: 以色列与真主党的战斗如何融入伊朗战争
summary: After the US and Israel began their war with Iran on Feb. 28, the Iran-backed Lebanese militia Hezbollah was quick to join the fray, firing rockets and drones into Israel. Officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive Hezbollah, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border.

title: Italy Won’t Take Sides on Paschi, Says It’s All About the Money
title_cn: 意大利不会在帕斯基问题上选边站，表示一切都是为了钱
summary: Italy’s Finance Minister Giancarlo Giorgetti indicated the government won’t interfere in any battle for control of Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, saying price will determine whether Banco BPM SpA or Intesa Sanpaolo SpA prevail.

title: Biden’s Defense Chief Austin Says US Navy Could Open Hormuz
title_cn: 拜登的国防部长奥斯汀表示美国海军可以打开霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Former Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin said the US Navy is capable of prying open the Strait of Hormuz but that an extended military operation to free up the vital oil and gas waterway would be costly and require allies.

title: Honeywell Expects to Absorb Iran Impact as War De-Escalates
title_cn: 随着战争升级，霍尼韦尔预计将吸收伊朗的影响
summary: Honeywell International Inc. reaffirmed its guidance ahead of the planned spinoff of its aerospace business, saying it expects to absorb the near-term financial impact from the war in Iran.

title: Former US Defense Secretary Austin Doesn't Think China Will Take Taiwan by Force
title_cn: 美国前国防部长奥斯汀不认为中国会武力占领台湾
summary: Former US Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin talks about the war in Iran, a possible peace deal, the importance of NATO and how a battle over Taiwan between the US and China could impact the global economy. He speaks to Bloomberg's London Bureau Chief Ruth David at the HSBC Gulf Cooperation Council Exchanges Conference in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Clashes in Pakistan-Controlled Kashmir Leave Seven Dead
title_cn: 巴控克什米尔冲突造成七人死亡
summary: Seven people were killed, while many others were injured in a clash between the recently proscribed Joint Awami Action Committee and the police on Sunday in the city of Rawalakot in the Pakistan-controlled region of Kashmir.
